query: SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, d.nome as departamento_lidera FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_department_roles udr ON u.id = udr.userId AND udr.assignmentType = 'LEADER' LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON udr.departmentId = d.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%ANA PAULA ALVES SANTOS%' OR u.email LIKE '%ana.paula%' LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, d.nome as departamento_lidera FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_department_roles udr ON u.id = udr.userId AND udr.assignmentType = 'LEADER' LEFT JOIN departamentos d ON udr.departmentId = d.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%ANA PAULA ALVES SANTOS%' OR u.email LIKE '%ana.paula%' LIMIT 10;
